name: howell-technologies-portal
description: Monorepo for the Howell Technologies admin portal and reusable PortalApp package.

scripts.docker: sh -c 'docker container rm -f howell-technologies-portal >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; while docker container inspect howell-technologies-portal >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; docker build -t howell-technologies-portal . && docker run -d --restart unless-stopped --name howell-technologies-portal -p ${PORT:-5173}:80 howell-technologies-portal'
